testcase.name: Saltivska 20 UAH per hour for 70 minutes costs 23_34 UAH
calculate exactly 1 minute at 60 UAH per hour returns 1 UAH
calculate 30 minutes at 60 UAH per hour returns 30 UAH
calculate 1 hour at 60 UAH per hour returns 60 UAH
calculate 2 hours at 30 UAH per hour returns 60 UAH
calculate returns zero for zero pricePerHour
Pryvokazalna 30 UAH per hour for 45 minutes costs 22_50 UAH
formatCost returns Безкоштовно for zero cost
calculate 1 second rounds up to 1 billable minute
calculate 61 seconds rounds up to 2 billable minutes
formatCost formats non-zero cost with two decimal places
calculate 90 minutes at 20 UAH per hour returns 30 UAH
calculate returns zero when elapsed time is zero
formatCost formats round number with two decimal places
calculate returns zero for null pricePerHour
